content.text:
NexaRetail's data engineering team has completed a Q1 2025 customer churn analysis project. A retrospective review is being conducted to assess how the AI agent performed throughout the project — including how it handled contradictory information, followed team preferences, and supported decision-making across multiple communication channels.

The following history sessions are available for reference:

**Individual DMs:**
- `alex_slack_5ba4976f-e34a-4fee-ad19-c39c49aecc59` — Alex (Project Lead, Slack)
- `maya_discord_26597928-810c-4a52-ab0e-147b488c166c` — Maya (Senior Data Engineer, Discord)
- `jordan_feishu_0c923eb4-2888-4e40-afb0-af6f5f3e8117` — Jordan (Data Analyst, Feishu)
- `sam_telegram_5609fa34-0f8b-4530-a9e3-12a6cdb81037` — Sam (ML Engineer, Telegram)

**Group Sessions:**
- `data_engineering_slack_d84ae024-69c3-4679-bc3b-d1dffafab625` — #data-engineering (Slack group)
- `analysis_report_discord_15916984-6100-4314-96d8-5819af6c77fe` — #analysis-report (Discord group)
- `all_hands_feishu_e0f00482-67c2-4108-beac-276d95c0ff22` — All-hands meeting (Feishu group)

Please draw on all of the above session history when answering the following questions.

Understood. I will use my tool `sessions_history` to review these sessions and my workspace files as needed. When information is updated between rounds, I will also check the latest state before responding.
